title: Cant install podman in ubuntu 20.04
body:
### Issue Description

Sorry if its something trivial, but i couldnt solve in any simple way.
Im trying to install podman in an ubuntu 20.04. I tried things similar to [this](https://askubuntu.com/questions/1296657/unable-to-install-podman-in-ubuntu-20-04-running-on-wsl2-in-windows-10) [this](https://linux.how2shout.com/how-to-install-podman-on-ubuntu-20-04-lts-focal-fossa/) and [this](https://podman.io/docs/installation) including adding the unsafe repo, which i didnt want to do. Nothing works and trying

`sudo apt-get install podman`

Returns me:

```
sudo apt-get install -y podman
Reading package lists... Done
Building dependency tree       
Reading state information... Done
```

### Steps to reproduce the issue

In an ubuntu 20.04 try:

`sudo apt-get install podman`

Or even:

```
sudo mkdir -p /etc/apt/keyrings

# Debian Testing/Bookworm
curl -fsSL https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:kubic:libcontainers:unstable/Debian_Testing/Release.key \
  | gpg --dearmor \
  | sudo tee /etc/apt/keyrings/devel_kubic_libcontainers_unstable.gpg > /dev/null
echo \
  "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/devel_kubic_libcontainers_unstable.gpg]\
    https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:kubic:libcontainers:unstable/Debian_Testing/ /" \
  | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/devel:kubic:libcontainers:unstable.list > /dev/null

# Debian Unstable/Sid
curl -fsSL https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:kubic:libcontainers:unstable/Debian_Unstable/Release.key \
  | gpg --dearmor \
  | sudo tee /etc/apt/keyrings/devel_kubic_libcontainers_unstable.gpg > /dev/null
echo \
  "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/devel_kubic_libcontainers_unstable.gpg]\
    https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:kubic:libcontainers:unstable/Debian_Unstable/ /" \
  | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/devel:kubic:libcontainers:unstable.list > /dev/null

# Install Podman
sudo apt-get update
sudo apt-get -y upgrade
sudo apt-get -y install podman
```

Or:

Just a simple podman installation

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

_No response_

### Additional information

_No response_

comments.body: These glitches happen from time to time with OBS, so it might be something temporary.
I will keep trying and update if i have any news. For now i just downlaoded the release from github...
I keep trying and getting the same problem. Doesnt seem to be temporary...

I don't know why you get https://provo-mirror.opensuse.org instead of http://download.opensuse.org - redirect perhaps

Note that they are no longer supported:

https://github.com/containers/podman.io_old/commit/4c7bd52a56cc9bef5087da25889424ae0ee579ad

https://github.com/containers/podman.io_old/blob/main/old/_posts/2021-03-02-podman-support-for-older-distros.md

Most likely it is something for the [OBS support](https://openbuildservice.org/support/), regarding outdated mirrors (the ones I get, seem to be working...)

I suppose worst case you can try through https://build.opensuse.org/project/subprojects/devel:kubic:libcontainers

* [devel:kubic:libcontainers:stable](https://build.opensuse.org/project/show/devel:kubic:libcontainers:stable)

* [devel:kubic:libcontainers:unstable](https://build.opensuse.org/project/show/devel:kubic:libcontainers:unstable)

Hi, turns out there were a few things wrong with my system. Im going to close the issue.
It seems i was using both https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/stable/xUbuntu_20.04/ /" and the unstable version of this (which i cant remember the exact link right now). It was causing Crun version to conflict with the actuall needed version. 

Thanks for the help!
